# Mark Scheiber

> Independent design & development studio in Boise, Idaho. Mark Scheiber designs and builds futuristic, beautifully engineered websites and mobile apps for businesses that want to stand apart.

Contact: mark.scheiber@scheiberintelligence.com
Location: Boise, Idaho — available worldwide

## Sections

- [Full site content (markdown)](/llms-full.txt): Everything below in one file.

## Services

- **Websites** — Marketing sites, portfolios, and storefronts engineered for speed, SEO, and a story worth telling. Custom design, responsive & accessible, CMS or static.
- **Mobile Apps** — iOS and Android applications that feel native, scale gracefully, and look unmistakable. iOS & Android, cross platform, app store launch.
- **Design Systems** — Brand-aligned UI systems and motion language so every screen feels like the same product. Identity & UI, component libraries, motion design.

## Selected Work

- **Business Websites** (Web · Design) — Professional websites built for small and growing businesses.
- **AI Powered Calorie Tracker** (Mobile · AI) — Just tell Siri what you ate; it logs and populates the dashboard automatically.
- **Business AI Automation** (AI · Automation) — Helping businesses put AI to work — automating tasks, saving time, and staying ahead of the curve.

## About

Based in Boise, Idaho, Mark helps businesses ship digital products that look and feel like they're from the future — without sacrificing the fundamentals: speed, clarity, and reliability. A studio of one, built on craft. 1:1 direct collaboration with no middlemen, end to end from design through build, launch, and support.

## Contact

- Email: mark.scheiber@scheiberintelligence.com
- Location: Boise, Idaho · Available worldwide
